description: Led the product and UX design team for a global learning platform. Full design lifecycle from discovery research to usability testing. Defined scalable design systems and collaborated with cross-functional teams.
Taught the UX Research course in the official Master's in Interaction and UX Design. Mentored students in research planning, data synthesis and evidence-based design.
Led user research and product design for diverse projects across industries. Transformed user insights into validated prototypes and design systems.
Defined and implemented the UX vision for the Andalusian Regional Government's digital transformation. Created and maintained a scalable design system with documented components.
